state_model.semantics: This file records bounded ownership and the verified main baseline at workstream creation. Live GitHub pull-request, commit, CI, review, and deployment evidence determines current state and supersedes cached status.

last_completed_increment.title: Reconcile project state after blocked PR 12 merge

workstreams.objective: Release the merged PR #13 reconciliation ownership, advance the verified baseline, record the missing independent-review gate, and replace self-staling open-PR assertions with live-resolved lifecycle semantics.
verification_criteria: the pull-request diff contains exactly the two permitted paths
the branch starts from PR #13 merge commit 48d0a45875bd3aa6c87b51383d6b05e9e0e3fce1
PR #13 is recorded as merged with zero submitted reviews and an observed owner merge action
PR #12 and PR #13 governance incidents remain distinct
pull-request lifecycle state is resolved from live GitHub rather than cached as open or merged
a merged or closed reconciliation pull request releases ownership without another state-only cleanup
no runtime, documentation, workflow, deployment, credential, or equipment-control path changes

verification_evidence.pr13_exact_head_ci: PR #13 head 4b58f01c4b1ae919dc6d55d278cbf475eba4681d passed install, lint, and tests on Python 3.11 and 3.12 before merge.
verification_evidence.pr13_review_lookup: Live GitHub returned zero submitted reviews for PR #13.
verification_evidence.current_head_ci: Resolve only from live GitHub for the exact current reconciliation head.
verification_evidence.evidence_boundary: The repository-owner merge action is evidence of an explicit merge action, not evidence of independent review.

workstreams.next_gate: Obtain successful exact-head CI and one independent approving review before merge. Resolve ownership from the live pull-request state after merge or closure.

authoritative.notes: Owns the deterministic machine-event reasoning core and current LineAlert implementation lineage.

active_related_boundaries.notes: Owns governed evidence-package and transport contracts; it is not merged into LineAlert Core.
Owns containment and policy enforcement; it is not the LineAlert implementation repository.

design_archaeology.disposition: Open PR #2 and PR #3 are non-current prototype work. Do not merge or copy wholesale into linealert-core. Reuse requires a new bounded branch, explicit source attribution, current authority boundaries, focused tests, and review.

Open PR #1 is non-current prototype work. Do not merge it into the current lineage or copy it wholesale. Preserve the repository as historical evidence unless a bounded current increment deliberately re-derives selected behavior.

Preserve as design archaeology. It is not current LineAlert persistence, retrieval, or lifecycle-system authority. Future persistence integration requires a separately governed current architecture and package boundary.

governance_incidents.description: PR #12 merged while its pull-request body and branch project state explicitly prohibited merge until PR #11 resolved and overlapping project-state ownership was reconciled.
governance_incidents.interpretation: The implementation is merged repository reality. Passing CI did not satisfy or erase the recorded governance gate.
governance_incidents.corrective_action: PR #11 was closed without merge and repository state was reconciled through PR #13.

governance_incidents.review_evidence: Live GitHub returned zero submitted reviews.
governance_incidents.approval_evidence: The repository owner performed the GitHub merge action.
governance_incidents.interpretation: The owner merge action is explicit human action, but it is not independent review and did not satisfy the recorded review gate.
governance_incidents.corrective_action: Require at least one approving review with no owner bypass before future merges.

main_review_gate.configuration_evidence: No submitted review existed when PR #13 merged.
main_review_gate.next_gate: Enable a main-branch protection rule or repository ruleset requiring one approval and preventing bypass before this reconciliation merges.

deployment_state.evidence: No current LineAlert Core deployment evidence is recorded in this repository state.
